message:
feat(streaming): Add fcp-streaming crate for real-time data support

Implements unified streaming library for FCP connectors:
- Server-Sent Events (SSE) with RFC 6455 compliant parsing
- Multi-line data handling, event types, IDs, and retry intervals
- WebSocket support with text/binary messages and close handling
- Stream processing utilities: timeout, batching, counting, rate limiting
- Automatic reconnection with configurable exponential backoff
- Buffer management with overflow protection

All 24 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,41 @@
+[package]
+name = "fcp-streaming"
+version = "0.1.0"
+edition = "2021"
+description = "Unified streaming library for FCP connectors"
+license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
+repository = "https://github.com/anthropics/fcp"
+
+[dependencies]
+fcp-core = { path = "../fcp-core" }
+
+# Async runtime
+tokio = { workspace = true, features = ["sync", "time", "rt"] }
+tokio-stream.workspace = true
+async-trait.workspace = true
+futures-util.workspace = true
+
+# HTTP client for SSE
+reqwest = { workspace = true, features = ["stream"] }
+
+# WebSocket
+tokio-tungstenite.workspace = true
+
+# Serialization
+serde.workspace = true
+serde_json.workspace = true
+
+# Error handling
+thiserror.workspace = true
+
+# Logging
+tracing.workspace = true
+
+# Utilities
+bytes.workspace = true
+pin-project-lite = "0.2"
+url = "2.5"
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+tokio = { workspace = true, features = ["rt-multi-thread", "macros"] }
+wiremock = "0.6"

@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+//! Streaming error types.
+
+use std::time::Duration;
+
+/// Streaming errors.
+#[derive(Debug, thiserror::Error)]
+pub enum StreamError {
+    /// Connection failed.
+    #[error("Connection failed: {0}")]
+    ConnectionFailed(String),
+
+    /// Connection closed unexpectedly.
+    #[error("Connection closed: {reason}")]
+    ConnectionClosed {
+        /// Close reason.
+        reason: String,
+        /// Close code (for WebSocket).
+        code: Option<u16>,
+    },
+
+    /// HTTP error.
+    #[error("HTTP error: {status} - {message}")]
+    HttpError {
+        /// HTTP status code.
+        status: u16,
+        /// Error message.
+        message: String,
+    },
+
+    /// Parse error.
+    #[error("Parse error: {0}")]
+    ParseError(String),
+
+    /// Timeout.
+    #[error("Timeout after {0:?}")]
+    Timeout(Duration),
+
+    /// Reconnection limit exceeded.
+    #[error("Reconnection limit exceeded after {attempts} attempts")]
+    ReconnectLimitExceeded {
+        /// Number of reconnection attempts.
+        attempts: u32,
+    },
+
+    /// Buffer overflow.
+    #[error("Buffer overflow: {size} bytes exceeds limit of {limit}")]
+    BufferOverflow {
+        /// Current size.
+        size: usize,
+        /// Maximum allowed size.
+        limit: usize,
+    },
+
+    /// Invalid state.
+    #[error("Invalid state: {0}")]
+    InvalidState(String),
+
+    /// WebSocket error.
+    #[error("WebSocket error: {0}")]
+    WebSocketError(String),
+
+    /// SSE error.
+    #[error("SSE error: {0}")]
+    SseError(String),
+
+    /// I/O error.
+    #[error("I/O error: {0}")]
+    IoError(#[from] std::io::Error),
+
+    /// HTTP client error.
+    #[error("HTTP client error: {0}")]
+    ReqwestError(#[from] reqwest::Error),
+}
+
+/// Result type for streaming operations.
+pub type StreamResult<T> = Result<T, StreamError>;
